title: Q AMVs
wikitext:
[]: Q AMVs             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu May 16, 2013 7:33 pm ...the first have hit the web, not sure if we can converse about them in the regular AMV thread. Behold THIS baby here http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UJwFy24a5kA which perfectly encapsulated the senseless waste of life and civilization that occured in Q itself/ in the time skip.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Thu May 16, 2013 8:12 pm TheDrmcvey pointed this one out to me earlier, it's not technically entirely a Q AMV but it has scenes from 3.33 as well as the earlier films. I think it's very well done myself, although the resolution (pixely-ness) of some scenes could have been better.

[]:             Quote Post by Xie » Thu May 16, 2013 9:02 pm Squeeeeeeee!!!! Hollywood Undead, and its my favorite song from them too.

[]: first vid             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Fri May 17, 2013 10:24 am Not a big fan of this type of music, but nonetheless the video fits perfectly well with it, considering this is the poster's first AMV, I am pretty damn impressed. It's gonna get some replay from me.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 18, 2013 3:35 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qhub4RwjGuc <- Here's another one, with awesome Death Stars Music to boot, centered on Shinji vs. Asuka. I just really hope the song wasn't chosen for incredibly lame politically insensitive pun on Asuka's nationality, because it really IS damn appropiate to Q's hopeless wasteland of a world.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon May 20, 2013 8:48 am Follow up (more like completely redone improved version) to the one I posted earlier. Better quality and still pretty damn impressive, if I do say so myself. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BxSVowMfYl0

[]:             Quote Post by thegoodson » Mon May 27, 2013 2:04 pm I was in the middle of editing some footage I filmed and when I hit a wall I decided "What the hell, I'll make an AMV." This is actually the first one I've ever made, was pretty fun to do. There's some parts I'd like to fine tune a bit rhythmically, but overall I'm pretty proud of it. Also picked a band that I don't think is usually used in these sort of things. Enjoy! [url]http://vimeo.com/67033979[/url][/url]

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed May 29, 2013 4:44 pm Evangelion 3.0 - Paradise

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri May 31, 2013 3:35 pm I had an idea, and a MAC; this is the result https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=60h1FjH83pY Some of the transitions are crap, this is me trying really hard to sync the boom in the song with the boom in the film, but the boom was a success. Also this the first time I did an amv. Major spoilers obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Fri May 31, 2013 4:05 pm Eh, some of them are okay, I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by andreh » Fri May 31, 2013 6:24 pm The best 'AMV' 4eva: [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ihx0XWhkvmQ[/url]

[]: Shingeki no Kyojin Eva intro ;P             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sat Jun 08, 2013 10:17 pm Check it out ;P SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Sat Jun 08, 2013 10:25 pm Holy shit! That was nerdgasm fuel in concentrated awesomeness pills!

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sat Jun 08, 2013 10:27 pm LOOOL....i get the same reaction when i saw it ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Jun 08, 2013 11:09 pm Normally, I can't stand AMV's and stuff along these lines. But this was actually good.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jun 09, 2013 3:50 am I think I actually recommended this a while ago in this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/637048/-Q-AMVs/ Shinoyami65 wrote: Follow up (more like completely redone improved version) to the one I posted earlier. Better quality and still pretty damn impressive, if I do say so myself. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BxSVowMfYl0

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jun 09, 2013 1:20 pm Well, brush my teeth and call me smiley. That was amazing. I'm beginning to believe that Guren no Yumiya goes with everything.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Nov 03, 2013 6:04 pm Hey, it's been a long time since no one posted here(and most of the links are dead thanks to Youtube's AMV hunt...), so here goes a new one, it use four of the song of 3.0 with the ambient that goes with it(sad and melancholic with "Kindred Spirits", all action packed with "God's Gift"...), I especially like the first two parts, where it show the tragedy of everything from 1.0 and 2.0 that's been lost to Third Impact : http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wIRnr-sATXs
